017package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021/**
022 * Represents a JSON property in the JSON-Schema core specification.
023 */
024public class JsonSchemaProperty extends JsonSchema {
025
026   /**
027    * Default constructor.
028    */
029   public JsonSchemaProperty() {}
030
031   /**
032    * Convenience constructor.
033    *
034    * @param name The name of this property.
035    */
036   public JsonSchemaProperty(String name) {
037      setName(name);
038   }
039
040   /**
041    * Convenience constructor.
042    *
043    * @param name The name of this property.
044    * @param type The JSON type of this property.
045    */
046   public JsonSchemaProperty(String name, JsonType type) {
047      setName(name);
048      setType(type);
049   }
050
051   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
052   public JsonSchemaProperty addAdditionalItems(JsonSchema...value) {
053      super.addAdditionalItems(value);
054      return this;
055   }
056
057   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
058   public JsonSchemaProperty addAllOf(JsonSchema...value) {
059      super.addAllOf(value);
060      return this;
061   }
062
063   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
064   public JsonSchemaProperty addAnyOf(JsonSchema...value) {
065      super.addAnyOf(value);
066      return this;
067   }
068
069   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
070   public JsonSchemaProperty addDef(String name, JsonSchema value) {
071      super.addDef(name, value);
072      return this;
073   }
074
075   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
076   public JsonSchemaProperty addDefinition(String name, JsonSchema value) {
077      super.addDefinition(name, value);
078      return this;
079   }
080
081   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
082   public JsonSchemaProperty addDependency(String name, JsonSchema value) {
083      super.addDependency(name, value);
084      return this;
085   }
086
087   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
088   public JsonSchemaProperty addDependentRequired(String name, List<String> value) {
089      super.addDependentRequired(name, value);
090      return this;
091   }
092
093   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
094   public JsonSchemaProperty addDependentSchema(String name, JsonSchema value) {
095      super.addDependentSchema(name, value);
096      return this;
097   }
098
099   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
100   public JsonSchemaProperty addEnum(Object...value) {
101      super.addEnum(value);
102      return this;
103   }
104
105   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
106   public JsonSchemaProperty addExamples(Object...value) {
107      super.addExamples(value);
108      return this;
109   }
110
111   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
112   public JsonSchemaProperty addItems(JsonSchema...value) {
113      super.addItems(value);
114      return this;
115   }
116
117   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
118   public JsonSchemaProperty addOneOf(JsonSchema...value) {
119      super.addOneOf(value);
120      return this;
121   }
122
123   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
124   public JsonSchemaProperty addPatternProperties(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
125      super.addPatternProperties(value);
126      return this;
127   }
128
129   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
130   public JsonSchemaProperty addPrefixItems(JsonSchema...value) {
131      super.addPrefixItems(value);
132      return this;
133   }
134
135   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
136   public JsonSchemaProperty addProperties(JsonSchema...value) {
137      super.addProperties(value);
138      return this;
139   }
140
141   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
142   public JsonSchemaProperty addRequired(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
143      super.addRequired(value);
144      return this;
145   }
146
147   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
148   public JsonSchemaProperty addRequired(List<String> value) {
149      super.addRequired(value);
150      return this;
151   }
152
153   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
154   public JsonSchemaProperty addRequired(String...value) {
155      super.addRequired(value);
156      return this;
157   }
158
159   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
160   public JsonSchemaProperty addTypes(JsonType...value) {
161      super.addTypes(value);
162      return this;
163   }
164
165   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
166   public JsonSchemaProperty setAllOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
167      super.setAllOf(value);
168      return this;
169   }
170
171   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
172   public JsonSchemaProperty setAnyOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
173      super.setAnyOf(value);
174      return this;
175   }
176
177   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
178   public JsonSchemaProperty setConst(Object value) {
179      super.setConst(value);
180      return this;
181   }
182
183   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
184   public JsonSchemaProperty setContentEncoding(String value) {
185      super.setContentEncoding(value);
186      return this;
187   }
188
189   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
190   public JsonSchemaProperty setContentMediaType(String value) {
191      super.setContentMediaType(value);
192      return this;
193   }
194
195   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
196   public JsonSchemaProperty setDeprecated(Boolean value) {
197      super.setDeprecated(value);
198      return this;
199   }
200
201   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
202   public JsonSchemaProperty setComment(String value) {
203      super.setComment(value);
204      return this;
205   }
206
207   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
208   public JsonSchemaProperty setDefinitions(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
209      super.setDefinitions(value);
210      return this;
211   }
212
213   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
214   public JsonSchemaProperty setDependencies(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
215      super.setDependencies(value);
216      return this;
217   }
218
219   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
220   public JsonSchemaProperty setDependentRequired(Map<String,List<String>> value) {
221      super.setDependentRequired(value);
222      return this;
223   }
224
225   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
226   public JsonSchemaProperty setDependentSchemas(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
227      super.setDependentSchemas(value);
228      return this;
229   }
230
231   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
232   public JsonSchemaProperty setDescription(String value) {
233      super.setDescription(value);
234      return this;
235   }
236
237   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
238   public JsonSchemaProperty setFormat(String value) {
239      super.setFormat(value);
240      return this;
241   }
242
243   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
244   public JsonSchemaProperty setEnum(List<Object> value) {
245      super.setEnum(value);
246      return this;
247   }
248
249   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
250   public JsonSchemaProperty setExamples(List<Object> value) {
251      super.setExamples(value);
252      return this;
253   }
254
255   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
256   public JsonSchemaProperty setExclusiveMaximum(Number value) {
257      super.setExclusiveMaximum(value);
258      return this;
259   }
260
261   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
262   public JsonSchemaProperty setExclusiveMinimum(Number value) {
263      super.setExclusiveMinimum(value);
264      return this;
265   }
266
267   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
268   @SuppressWarnings({
269      "removal", // Uses deprecated API for compatibility
270   })
271   public JsonSchemaProperty setId(Object value) {
272      super.setId(value);
273      return this;
274   }
275
276   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
277   public JsonSchemaProperty setMaximum(Number value) {
278      super.setMaximum(value);
279      return this;
280   }
281
282   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
283   public JsonSchemaProperty setMaxItems(Integer value) {
284      super.setMaxItems(value);
285      return this;
286   }
287
288   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
289   public JsonSchemaProperty setMaxLength(Integer value) {
290      super.setMaxLength(value);
291      return this;
292   }
293
294   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
295   public JsonSchemaProperty setMaxProperties(Integer value) {
296      super.setMaxProperties(value);
297      return this;
298   }
299
300   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
301   public JsonSchemaProperty setMinimum(Number value) {
302      super.setMinimum(value);
303      return this;
304   }
305
306   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
307   public JsonSchemaProperty setMinItems(Integer value) {
308      super.setMinItems(value);
309      return this;
310   }
311
312   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
313   public JsonSchemaProperty setMinLength(Integer value) {
314      super.setMinLength(value);
315      return this;
316   }
317
318   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
319   public JsonSchemaProperty setMinProperties(Integer value) {
320      super.setMinProperties(value);
321      return this;
322   }
323
324   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
325   public JsonSchemaProperty setMultipleOf(Number value) {
326      super.setMultipleOf(value);
327      return this;
328   }
329
330   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
331   public JsonSchemaProperty setName(String value) {
332      super.setName(value);
333      return this;
334   }
335
336   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
337   public JsonSchemaProperty setNot(JsonSchema value) {
338      super.setNot(value);
339      return this;
340   }
341
342   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
343   public JsonSchemaProperty setOneOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
344      super.setOneOf(value);
345      return this;
346   }
347
348   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
349   public JsonSchemaProperty setPattern(String value) {
350      super.setPattern(value);
351      return this;
352   }
353
354   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
355   public JsonSchemaProperty setPatternProperties(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
356      super.setPatternProperties(value);
357      return this;
358   }
359
360   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
361   public JsonSchemaProperty setPrefixItems(JsonSchemaArray value) {
362      super.setPrefixItems(value);
363      return this;
364   }
365
366   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
367   public JsonSchemaProperty setProperties(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
368      super.setProperties(value);
369      return this;
370   }
371
372   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
373   public JsonSchemaProperty setReadOnly(Boolean value) {
374      super.setReadOnly(value);
375      return this;
376   }
377
378   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
379   public JsonSchemaProperty setRequired(List<String> value) {
380      super.setRequired(value);
381      return this;
382   }
383
384   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
385   public JsonSchemaProperty setSchemaMap(JsonSchemaMap value) {
386      super.setSchemaMap(value);
387      return this;
388   }
389
390   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
391   public JsonSchemaProperty setSummary(String value) {
392      super.setSummary(value);
393      return this;
394   }
395
396   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
397   public JsonSchemaProperty setTitle(String value) {
398      super.setTitle(value);
399      return this;
400   }
401
402   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
403   public JsonSchemaProperty setType(Object value) {
404      super.setType(value);
405      return this;
406   }
407
408   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
409   public JsonSchemaProperty setUnevaluatedItems(JsonSchema value) {
410      super.setUnevaluatedItems(value);
411      return this;
412   }
413
414   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
415   public JsonSchemaProperty setUnevaluatedProperties(JsonSchema value) {
416      super.setUnevaluatedProperties(value);
417      return this;
418   }
419
420   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
421   public JsonSchemaProperty setUniqueItems(Boolean value) {
422      super.setUniqueItems(value);
423      return this;
424   }
425
426   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
427   public JsonSchemaProperty setWriteOnly(Boolean value) {
428      super.setWriteOnly(value);
429      return this;
430   }
431}
